text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Sigh… Why are we getting so much homework lately?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Are we? I can't say I've noticed any change.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
I am. In fact, I've already finished
the math homework due tomorrow…

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: What?! No way! But those were so hard…

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
…Oh, I getcha. You just filled in an answer
to get it done, didn't you?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
I would never! I always show
my work… and I'll prove it!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Come to my room later today!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: All right… We'll see who proves who wrong…

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
…And I might take a quick peek at your
answers while I'm there. Teehee☆
